title: EasyRituals
description: This plugin adds a simple command /startritual (minutes) which starts a ritual at those co ords for the item you are holding
body:
This plugin adds a very simple command:
### **/startritual (minutes)**
By doing that command the item you are holding will appear where you are stainding and a message will appear in chat:
A ritual has started at (x, y, z) in (dimension)
also a bossbar will appear saying:
Ritual at (x, y, z) in (dimension) - (seconds) left
